name: sociological-studies-skills
description: An opinionated agent skill stack for manuscripts targeted at 《社会学研究》, the flagship sociology journal of the Institute of Sociology, Chinese Academy of Social Sciences.

plugins.name: sociological-studies-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the 《社会学研究》 manuscript lifecycle for both quantitative and qualitative sociology: workflow router, fit positioning, sociological problematic, theory dialogue, quantitative craft (CGSS/CFPS/CLDS), qualitative craft (ethnography/interview/grounded theory), social-process mechanism, concept building, scholarly style, abstract + keywords, submission preflight, and rebuttal.
